title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hindustan Unilever - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hindustan Unilever - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Hindustan Unilever has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hindustan Unilever:
Hindustan Unilever is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Unilever!
